qcSource: Author Test Cases - Click to Reveal.pdf

legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity/step bootstrap, reveal runtime, Preview/Reader click interaction, media upload (OS file picker), Publish/Republish, persistence-after-reload, validation, or edge/responsive flows.

Enter Instructions for Teachers — page-level field, not the component
